veo_prompt: Side view, 2D game character animation of this exact soldier. He walks with a natural marching walk cycle: alternating steps, subtle torso bob, spear held steady. No combat, no attacks, no running sprint—only walking. CRITICAL for looping: the motion must return to the same pose and foot placement at the end as at the start, so the clip can tile seamlessly (match stance, spear angle, and silhouette). Camera locked; character stays centered; no lateral travel that drifts off frame. Flat, uniform chroma green screen background only; no floor texture, no shadows, no props; crisp edges for keying.
